---
title: "CML at AUM 2024"
description: "Joint City Modelling Lab presentation for Applied Urban Modelling 2024."
author: "Adam Dennett"
date: "2024-06-26"
categories: [talk, urban modelling]
---

City Modelling Lab joint presentation given at **Applied Urban Modelling 2024**.

- [Open the slides →](https://adamdennett.github.io/AUM2024/)
- [Source on GitHub](https://github.com/adamdennett/AUM2024)
